expectations.evidence: report.html exists and contains a valid 271-line HTML document with proper structure.
report.csv exists with 14 data rows plus a header row, properly formatted with columns: ID, File, Line, Category, Severity, Rule, Issue, Recommendation.

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A / 접근성)
expectations.evidence: Report has an 'Accessibility Issues (6)' section in English, but does not use 'Section A' or '접근성' labeling. No Korean text is present.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO & Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: Report has a 'Performance Issues (7)' section but no SEO section at all. No SEO-related items are evaluated anywhere in the report.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: Only 6 accessibility issues are listed (A1-A6) with generic rule names like 'aria-label-missing' and 'svg-missing-role'. No KWCAG2.2 item IDs or checklist structure is present.

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: No SEO items exist in the report. The CSV categories are only 'Accessibility' and 'Performance'.

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: No WP-prefixed items exist. Performance items use custom IDs (P1-P7), totaling only 7 items instead of the required 18 WP items.

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: All 13 issues include line references (e.g., 'Line 29-31', 'Line 50') and detailed descriptions of the problem in both HTML and CSV outputs.

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: Each issue includes an inline 'Fix' block with concrete code-level recommendations (e.g., 'Add aria-label', 'Use requestAnimationFrame', 'Add loading="lazy"'). However, there is no separate consolidated fix guide section.
The entire report is written in English. While the HTML lang attribute is set to 'ko', all content including titles, descriptions, and recommendations are in English.

expectations.text: Accessibility findings include specific KWCAG item IDs and line references
expectations.evidence: Accessibility findings use generic IDs (A1-A6) and WCAG references (e.g., 'WCAG 2.1 SC 4.1.2') but not specific KWCAG item IDs. Line references are present.

expectations.text: Performance findings include code-level analysis (layout thrashing, lazy loading, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Performance findings include layout thrashing analysis (P1, lines 12-13 offsetHeight/style.minHeight), CLS from delayed content (P2), lazy loading (P3), missing dimensions (P4), useLayoutEffect recommendation (P7), and more.
